safety_note: Public data only. No real funding partner names, private routing logic, affiliate links, apply links, private compensation data, private access details, borrower PII, or private review notes.
description: SEO page titles, descriptions, keywords, canonical paths, and schema hints for public pages.

global.safe_schema_rule: Do not include fake ratings, fake reviews, false claims, or partner-specific terms.

pages.title: Funding Readiness Scorecard
pages.meta_description: Find out if your business is funding-ready before you request review. Get a public-safe readiness score, potential funding path, and next steps.

pages.title: Run the Funding Readiness Scorecard
pages.meta_description: Answer a few questions about revenue, time in business, credit range, bank activity, structure, and funding purpose to estimate funding readiness.

pages.title: Funding Readiness Results Explained
pages.meta_description: Understand funding readiness tiers, potential blockers, document needs, and next steps after completing the scorecard.

pages.title: Funding Paths Explained for Business Owners
pages.meta_description: Compare public-safe funding path categories including working capital, equipment, e-commerce, real estate, startup, and prep-first readiness.

pages.title: Business Funding Document Prep Checklist
pages.meta_description: Prepare common documents for a funding-readiness review, including bank statements, revenue proof, entity details, and use-of-funds notes.

pages.title: Funding Broker Scorecard Workflow
pages.meta_description: Use a public-safe scorecard workflow to triage funding leads, identify document gaps, and route users toward appropriate next steps.

pages.title: Partner With a Funding Readiness Scorecard
pages.meta_description: Give your audience a funding-readiness tool that educates users before any funding conversation.

pages.title: White-Label Funding Readiness Scorecard
pages.meta_description: Use a white-label funding-readiness scorecard for broker, agency, or consultant intake while keeping public copy safe and educational.

pages.title: Funding Scorecard Embed Example
pages.meta_description: View a clean example of the public Funding Readiness Scorecard widget embedded inside another page.

pages.title: Scorecard Submitted
pages.meta_description: Your funding-readiness scorecard submission has been received. Review next steps and document prep guidance.

pages.title: Build Funding Readiness First
pages.meta_description: Use the prep-first path to improve business setup, documentation, bank activity, and funding-readiness signals before review.

pages.title: Funding Review Recommended
pages.meta_description: A manual review may help interpret mixed funding-readiness signals, document gaps, and potential next steps.

pages.title: High Funding Readiness Strategy Review
pages.meta_description: Strong readiness signals may justify a faster strategy review, document confirmation, and next-step planning.

pages.title: Funding Readiness Resources
pages.meta_description: Explore funding-readiness checklists, result explainers, document prep guides, and public-safe funding path resources.

pages.title: Funding Readiness FAQ
pages.meta_description: Answers to common questions about the Funding Readiness Scorecard, results, documents, privacy, brokers, and partner use.

pages.title: Privacy and Data Use
pages.meta_description: Learn how scorecard information may be used for readiness scoring, follow-up, human review, and educational next steps.

pages.title: Terms and Funding Readiness Disclaimer
